articles.title: PlayStation’s age-gating restrictions are coming to UK consoles
articles.description:
Sony is starting to comply with the UK's Online Safety Act by notifying PlayStation players of its age verification requirements today. PS4 and PS5 owners in the UK and Ireland won't be able to participate in voice chats, messaging, parties, or other third-party communication services from June unless they verify their age.
"Beginning June 2026, if you have not completed age verification, you can continue playing on PlayStation, but some features won't be available until you verify your age," says Sony in a support note. Age verification will also be required for broadcasting features or sharing gameplay to YouTube or Twitch from a PlayStat …
Read the full story at The Verge.

articles.title: Instagram says a bug turned your photos black and white
articles.description:
If Instagram has been turning your color photo posts into black and white recently, don’t worry, there’s no problem with your camera or your account. The Meta-owned app has confirmed to Engadget that the issue is caused by a bug that’s affecting HDR photos in particular. "Earlier today, a technical issue caused some HDR photos to appear incorrectly as black-and-white for a subset of accounts,” Instagram has told us. However, we see complaints dated April 18 and 19, so the issue has been going on a bit longer for some people. 
Regardless of when the bug started causing problems, the Instagram team said it has since corrected the issue. If your posts are still showing up in black and white, Instagram said the fix will automatically turn your affected photo posts back to their original state over the next few hours. “We apologize for any inconvenience,” they added. 
This article originally appeared on Engadget at https://www.engadget.com/apps/instagram-says-a-bug-turned-your-photos-black-and-white-061802389.html?src=rss

articles.title: Commerzbank Rejects UniCredit’s ‘Hostile’ Approach
articles.description: German lender Commerzbank AG says it has formally rejected Italian rival UniCredit Spa’s latest takeover proposal, saying it lacks value and undermines trust. Bloomberg's Tom Metcalf reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: Global markets face rising strain as supply chain tightens and oil risk persists: Neelkanth Mishra
articles.description: Global supply chains are showing stress as inventories run dry.  This is impacting manufacturing and even international aviation.  Oil markets face short-term volatility with long-term questions about resilience.  India's energy exposure is a temporary risk, with a focus on electrification.  The global economy operates within a narrowing window of resilience.

articles.description: Global stocks have clawed back losses triggered by the Iran conflict, with major indexes now trading at or above pre-war levels.

dailyNews.title: Governor's race wildly unpredictable two weeks before Californians receive ballots
dailyNews.description: Governor's race wildly unpredictable two weeks before Californians receive ballots. Former Biden Cabinet member Xavier Becerra surges, and former state Controller Betty Yee drops out.

dailyNews.title: Global Stock Rally Resumes, Oil Dips on Iran Talks: Markets Wrap
dailyNews.description: A rally in global equities resumed after a brief pause, as signs Iran may join talks with the US added to optimism over progress in the Middle East ahead of a looming ceasefire deadline. Oil declined.

dailyNews.title: FAA investigating extremely close call between 2 Southwest planes
dailyNews.description: The Federal Aviation Administration said it's investigating an extremely close call between two Southwest Airlines flights at Nashville International Airport.

dailyNews.title: Apple CEO Tim Cook is stepping down, John Ternus set to replace him
dailyNews.description: Apple CEO Tim Cook is stepping down, with the company announcing on Monday that John Ternus will take his place as the technology giant's leader.

dailyNews.title: Ben McKenzie Says Crypto Has a Secret Ingredient: Male Loneliness
dailyNews.description: The actor-director discussed his least favorite currency and read a series of mean tweets—about us!—at our inaugural WIRED@Night event.

dailyNews.title: Robot named Lightning blows past human runners to set half-marathon record in Beijing
dailyNews.description: Lightning, one of more than 100 robots running the Beijing E-Town, avoided a serious mishap and crossed the finish line in a record 50 minutes, 26 seconds.

dailyNews.title: A Hot-Air Balloon Landed in a California Backyard. The Owner Says It's a 'Very Rare' Event
dailyNews.description: The CEO of Magical Adventures Balloon Rides tells WIRED how the pilot made a safe landing after they got stranded over a neighborhood.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  'Songs In Sign Language' coming to Disney+
dailyNews.description: Musical sequences from three of Disney's most recent blockbusters are being reimagined for the deaf community.

dailyNews.title: Former state Controller Betty Yee drops out of the governor's race
dailyNews.description: Yee, lacking financial resources and voter recognition despite being elected to statewide office twice, dropped out of the 2026 governor's race.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Skydiver speaks out after crashing into scoreboard at college football game
dailyNews.description: A skydiver performing during a football game at Virginia Tech University crashed into the stadium's scoreboard and was left dangling high by his parachute.

dailyNews.title: Businesses start requests for Trump tariff refunds, but glitches reported in new portal
dailyNews.description: Beginning on Monday, businesses were able to apply for refunds for President Trump's tariffs that were later declared unconstitutional by the Supreme Court. Jo Ling Kent reports on some of the issues they're running into.

dailyNews.title: How Trump's messaging on Iran has shifted since saying they "agreed to everything"
dailyNews.description: Less than 48 hours after President Trump said Iran has "agreed to everything," he threatened the whole country would get "blown up" without a deal soon.

dailyNews.title: Mixed signals from Trump on state of talks with Iran
dailyNews.description: On Friday, President Trump was saying Iran had "agreed to everything," including giving up its nuclear program "forever." But by Monday, he had accused Iran of violating the ceasefire and warned that if a deal isn't reached, "then lots of bombs start going off." Ed O'Keefe reports.

dailyNews.title: Former Kennedy Center curator says he believes "real reason" behind closure is "financial decline"
dailyNews.description: In a recent article in The Atlantic, former Kennedy Center curator Josef Palermo revealed what he observed during his 10 months there as President Trump tightened his grip on the cultural institution. Palermo joins CBS News to discuss.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens Iran again as ceasefire deadline looms, U.S. gears up for peace talks
dailyNews.description: Trump reportedly said Sunday that if Iran doesn't sign a deal, "the whole country is going to get blown up," with its bridges and power plants being targeted.

dailyNews.title: South Korea's Kospi hits record high amid mixed Asia markets as hopes linger for Mideast peace
dailyNews.description: Korea's Kospi hits fresh intraday high, amid mixed Asian markets as investors brushed aside fresh threats from Trump on Iran ahead of a fragile ceasefire deadline.

dailyNews.title: Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer leaves Trump cabinet, Keith Sonderling takes over
dailyNews.description: Department of Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer is resigning from the Trump administration, the White House said.

dailyNews.title: Trump ‘unlikely’ to extend ceasefire as deadline for deal approaches
dailyNews.description: President Trump said he was “unlikely” to extend the ceasefire as he pushed the Iranian regime to agree to a nuclear deal. NBC News’ Garret Haake reports.
